title: Validation & Required feature - Connect columns

posts.author: beth1021 (Elisabeth Juliano)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

It would be great if the validation and required column feature extended to Connect columns

What are you trying to achieve

I often use Connect columns in place of drop down or status columns since it allows for multiple boards to work together.

There is a drop down column that has different items. If two of the items are selected, the user is currently prompted to leave a note in a Comments column. We would like to swap the drop down out for a Connect column for better organization and multi-board visibility, but then we lose the feature of when certain items are selected, the user has to add a comment.

posts.author: drtanvisachar (Dr. Tanvi Sachar- Certified Monday.com Partner)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi there,

At the moment, validation and required logic don’t extend to Connect columns the way they do with Status or Dropdown columns, so you’re right that you lose that conditional “leave a comment if X is selected” behavior when you switch.

A couple of possible workarounds you might explore:

• Use an automation such as “When Connect column changes and contains X, notify owner to add a comment”
• Add a Status helper column that mirrors the connected item type and drive the validation from that
• Use a form (if applicable) where conditional logic can enforce required fields before submission

It’s definitely a gap if you’re trying to fully replace structured columns with Connect columns, especially in more relational setups. I can see this being useful for teams building more advanced multi-board systems.

posts.author: noam.lapidot (Noam Lapidot)
posts.cookedHtml:
If you open to marketplace apps, you can an app named Workflow it’s monday native, allows required columns per step and supports connect board column.
